question_text: Write UI microcopy for these scenarios: (1) A user tries to delete their account (confirm dialog), (2) A payment fails (error message), (3) The user's free trial ends in 3 days (notification), (4) Sea

qwen36_plus.response:
**(1) Delete Account (Confirm Dialog)**  
Just to be sure: deleting your account is permanent. All your data and history will be gone forever. Cancel or Delete?

**(2) Payment Fails (Error Message)**  
We couldn’t process your payment. Double-check your card details or try another method. Still stuck? Our support team is here to help.

**(3) Free Trial Ends in 3 Days (Notification)**  
Heads up: your free trial wraps up in 3 days. Upgrade now so you don’t lose access to your workspace and saved data.

**(4) Search Returns Zero Results**  
No matches found. Try checking your spelling, using fewer keywords, or browsing our categories instead. We’re here if you need help!

**(5) App Loading (5+ seconds)**  
Still loading… this is taking a moment longer than usual. We’re gathering everything now. Thanks for hanging tight!

**(6) Just Completed Onboarding (Celebration)**  
You’re all set! 🎉 Thanks for getting started. Ready to dive in? Tap below to jump straight to your workspace.

judgment.brief_justification: All six scenarios are addressed with human-sounding, helpful microcopy that stays under or very close to 30 words. The tone is appropriate for each context—serious for deletion, empathetic for payment failure, celebratory for onboarding. Minor nitpick: a couple entries are right at the 30-word boundary, and the depth could be slightly greater with brief rationale for tone/word choices. Overall, excellent practical UX writing.

deepseek_v32.response:
**(1) Account Deletion**  
“This will delete your account and all data permanently. Are you sure? This can’t be undone.”

**(2) Payment Failed**  
“Your payment didn’t go through. Please check your payment details or try a different method.”

**(3) Trial Ending Soon**  
“Your free trial ends in 3 days. Ready to upgrade and keep your favorite features?”

**(4) Zero Search Results**  
“No exact matches. Try a broader search term or browse our popular categories.”

**(5) Extended Loading**  
“Gathering your data—thanks for your patience! This will just take a moment more.”

**(6) Onboarding Complete**  
“You’re all set! Get ready to explore everything your new workspace can do. 🎉”

judgment.brief_justification: All six scenarios are addressed with concise, human-sounding microcopy under 30 words. The copy is helpful and appropriate for each context. Minor depth limitations: the account deletion dialog could offer a softer alternative (e.g., 'pause' option), the payment error could mention retrying later, and the loading message could be more specific. Overall, solid professional-quality microcopy.
